title: Observation
description:
A scientific observation or measurement, modelled as a CIDOC-CRM E16 Measurement. Profiles
PROV-O's Activity: `startedAtTime`/`endedAtTime` carry the time of observation, `used` the
sensor or instrument involved (CIDOC-CRM P16_used_specific_object), `generated` the OGC
SensorThings API `Observation` resource holding the actual reading (CIDOC-CRM
P108_has_produced), `wasAssociatedWith` the operator or monitoring system responsible, and
`atLocation` where the observation took place. This block adds a local identifier, the
heritage object or place being measured, and the property observed.

identifier.description: A local identifier for this observation (CIDOC-CRM P1_is_identified_by).

measurementOf.description: URI of the `heritage-object` or `place` being measured (CIDOC-CRM P39_measured).

observedProperty.description: The property or phenomenon observed, typically a GEOSS Essential Variable or Getty AAT concept URI, e.g. relative humidity or surface temperature (CIDOC-CRM P40_observed_dimension).
